name: Norwegian Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg (or 2 egg whites or equivalent to 1 egg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg, sugar, vanilla extract, and baking powder together until smooth and fluffy.
2. Add flour to the mixture and beat until smooth and well blended.
3. Stir in chopped walnuts and diced apples.
4. Pour the filling into a lightly greased 8-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. The pie will puff up as it cooks and then collapse as it cools.
6. Serve warm, topped with a scoop of ice cream.
